channel.title: Tom Pickup — News & Updates
channel.description: News and updates from Tom Pickup, Lancashire County Councillor for Padiham and Burnley West.

item.title: Reform's First Budget: The Numbers Don't Lie
item.description: How Reform UK balanced a £1.33 billion budget, delivered the lowest council tax rise in a decade, and corrected a £28 million inherited overspend.

item.title: Stocks Massey awards over £20,000+ across Burnley: 2026 Applications Open Soon
item.description: The Edward Stocks Massey Bequest Fund has distributed £18,000 to 15 Burnley organisations in 2025. Applications for 2026 open late April.
